signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% and aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures before global energy volatility.[1]
